notes.sg-global-warming: Climate change is a consequence of meteorological processes but not a subfield of meteorology itself. It is a broader interdisciplinary field.
notes.sg-carbon-dioxide: The carbon cycle is a biogeochemical cycle and while related to climate, it is not a core subfield of meteorology. It is more related to Earth System Science or Ecology.
notes.sg-earth-system: Earth System Science is a broader, interdisciplinary field that encompasses meteorology but is not a subfield of it.
notes.sg-land-use: Land use is primarily a topic within geography, ecology, and urban planning, not a core subfield of meteorology.
